word: H6100 - עֶצְיֹון גֶּבֶר - ʻEtsyôwn Geber - ets-yone' gheh'ber - Ezion-geber

sections.paragraph:
עצין גּבר    עציון גּבר - ‛etsyôn geber ‛etsyôn geber - (both) ets-yone' gheh'-ber

From H6096 and H1397; backbone like of a man; Etsjon-Geber, a place on the Red Sea: - Ezion-gaber, Ezion-geber.
